Diagnose synchronization drift between two time bases

Source: R/roadmap-exact-backlog-helpers.R
diagnose_gazepoint_sync_drift.Rd

Estimates lag and linear drift between matched timestamps or event markers. A fixed lag has a near-zero drift slope; a changing lag has a non-zero slope.

Usage

diagnose_gazepoint_sync_drift(
  reference,
  target = NULL,
  reference_time_col = NULL,
  target_time_col = NULL,
  max_pairs = NULL
)

Arguments

reference

Reference timestamps or data frame.

target

Target timestamps or data frame.

reference_time_col

Optional reference time column.

target_time_col

Optional target time column.

max_pairs

Optional maximum number of matched pairs.

Value

List with summary and lag_table.
